edits.note: WP-06.3 — AI-Explain button: route the bespoke rgba amber tint + var(--bb-amber) fallback onto canonical accent tokens (accentSoft fill, accentLine border, accent text). This is an inline cssText fragment inside a template literal style="..." so it must close the string and concat GAM_TOK; the surrounding HTML string already uses single quotes inside the backtick template so the '+...+' concat is valid.

edits.oldString: const confColor = conf === null ? '#9b9892' : conf >= 80 ? '#44dd66' : conf >= 50 ? 'var(--bb-amber,#ff9933)' : '#ff4444';
edits.newString: const confColor = conf === null ? GAM_TOK.inkMuted : conf >= 80 ? GAM_TOK.success : conf >= 50 ? GAM_TOK.warn : GAM_TOK.danger;
edits.note: WP-06.3 — confidence chip colors map to success/warn/danger tokens (unknown -> ink-muted). JS swaps a token value, not a hex. Drops #44dd66 / #ff4444 / var(--bb-amber) literals; #9b9892 -> inkMuted (WCAG-bumped secondary).

WP-06.3 — AI-Explain popover adopts the floating-card shell: surface-panel bg + border-strong + 8px radius + 0 8px 24px scrim shadow (was deep-surface bg + amber border + 4px). z-index 99999999 collapsed onto the z-ladder popover tier (--z-t-popover) matching .gam-t-popover. Kills #0a0a0b / var(--bb-amber) / rgba(0,0,0,0.6) / #e8e6e1 / 99999999 literals. (Viewport-edge clamping is a JS-logic concern out of scope for the token migration; the existing left:0/absolute positioning is preserved.)
Popover close X: #9b9892 -> inkMuted (WCAG-bumped secondary).
Popover header title: var(--bb-amber) -> accent token (amber brand chrome).
Confidence chip: bespoke rgba(0,0,0,0.3) well -> surface-sunken token; 3px->6px radius (token chip radius). confColor stays token-driven from the prior edit.
Thumbs-down feedback button: #7a7672 border -> inkFaint, #9b9892 text -> inkMuted, 3px->6px radius.
Thumbs-down 'Noted' text color: #44dd66 -> success token (verified/OK state). Split to a single line to stay CRLF-agnostic.
Thumbs-down 'Noted' border color: #44dd66 -> success token. Split to a single line to stay CRLF-agnostic.

edits.oldString: try { thumbDown.textContent = '👎 wrong'; thumbDown.style.color = '#9b9892'; thumbDown.style.borderColor = '#7a7672'; thumbDown.disabled = false; } catch (_) {}
edits.newString: try { thumbDown.textContent = '👎 wrong'; thumbDown.style.color = GAM_TOK.inkMuted; thumbDown.style.borderColor = GAM_TOK.inkFaint; thumbDown.disabled = false; } catch (_) {}
edits.note: Thumbs-down reset after 2s: #9b9892 -> inkMuted, #7a7672 -> inkFaint (matches the initial cssText).
Citations header (caps label): #9b9892 -> inkMuted.
Citations list: #9b9892 -> inkMuted. Anchor includes 'cList.style.cssText =' prefix to disambiguate from the cHead line that shares the rgba-free tail.

WP-06.4 — section headers = 11px accent caps with .04em tracking (was 700/.5px/TEXT2-grey). Restyle only; class name preserved. Uses var(--gam-tok-accent) in <style> rule (var() safe here) with ${C.ACCENT} fallback. weight 700->600 per type scale label-caps; .5px->.04em canonical tracking.

WP-06.6 / 1.7 — verified chip onto success tokens. Raw rgba(61,214,140,*) -> --gam-tok-success-soft; ${C.GREEN} kept as fallback alongside --gam-tok-success. Border routed to success-soft token (single derived value) per the 12% soft-tint contract.
WP-06.6 — danger chip onto danger tokens. Raw rgba(240,64,64,*) -> --gam-tok-danger-soft + --gam-tok-danger.
WP-06.6 — caution chip onto warn tokens. Raw rgba(240,160,64,*) -> --gam-tok-warn-soft + --gam-tok-warn.

WP-06.6 / 1.7 — the 5-level ladder has NO yellow; the legacy mini/watch yellow (#ffd60a) collapses onto warn (caution/watch). Raw rgba(255,214,10,*) + ${C.YELLOW} replaced by warn tokens. Class name preserved (restyle only).
Score-hits accent routed to --gam-tok-warn token (was bare ${C.WARN}); keeps fallback.
WP-06 — inline-note well: raw rgba(74,158,255,*) blue tint -> --gam-tok-info-soft; ${C.TEXT} -> --gam-tok-ink; 4px->6px radius (token chip/well radius). Info-blue is the informational tint per §1.1.
Inline-note label: ${C.ACCENT} (legacy #4A9EFF blue) -> --gam-tok-info (WCAG-bumped #7cb8ff) per §2.2; ACCENT-as-blue is an info context, not brand amber.

WP-06.5 — empty state on surface-raised; empty/tip text routed to ink-muted (NEVER ink-faint) per §1.1. ${C.BG}->--gam-tok-surface-raised, ${C.BORDER}->--gam-tok-border, ${C.TEXT3} (tertiary grey)->--gam-tok-ink-muted; 4px->6px radius.

WP-06.5 — tip text -> ink-muted (never ink-faint); raw rgba(74,158,255,.05) -> --gam-tok-info-soft; left-keyline ${C.ACCENT} legacy blue -> --gam-tok-info (informational, not brand amber); 10px->12px secondary type; 3px->6px radius.

summary: WP-06 Intel Tab token migration: drives this component's raw hex/rgba literals to zero by routing them onto GAM_TOK (inline cssText) and var(--gam-tok-*) (style rules). Inline AI-Explain popover (renderIntelTab ~9357-9482) adopts the floating-card shell (surface-panel + border-strong + 8px radius + scrim shadow), maps its rogue z-index 99999999 onto the popover z-tier, and converts confidence-chip + close-X + thumbs-down + citations colors to tokens so JS only swaps token values (#44dd66/#ff4444/#9b9892/#7a7672/var(--bb-amber)/#0a0a0b/#e8e6e1 -> success/danger/inkMuted/inkFaint/accent/surfacePanel/ink). Intel CSS (~25199-25210, 24391) restyled per the brief: section heads -> 11px accent caps .04em; chip-ok/bad/warn -> success/danger/warn soft-token pairs; chip-mini's non-ladder yellow collapses onto warn; note-inline + intel-tip blue tints -> info-soft + info keyline; empty/tip text routed to ink-muted (never ink-faint); legacy #4A9EFF ACCENT-as-blue -> WCAG-bumped --gam-tok-info; #8b929e TEXT2 / #5c6370 TEXT3 -> ink-muted. All 49 locked selectors preserved (restyle only); no accessible-name textContent changed (tab/section labels untouched). 20 edits, each verified to occur exactly once.
